location: Rare drop from Fierce Demi-Human Chiefs in the Weeping Peninsula; one such Chief can be found asleep near the bridge west of the South of the Lookout Tower Site of Grace.
tactics: Only a 2% drop chance, so target the sleeping Chief west of the South of the Lookout Tower grace for a repeatable, low-risk farm — sneak attack, rest, repeat.
Fierce/Chief demi-humans hit far harder than the small ones nearby — don't mistake this fight for the easy variety.
A Silver Scarab talisman or other Discovery boosts speed up the farm given the low drop rate.
lore: A dagger whose blade grew sharper the more it was used — repeated slashing and stabbing left it darkened and hardened with crusted blood, and that same buildup is what makes it so effective at tearing flesh now.

builds.name: Early Strength bleed
builds.why: C-tier Strength scaling and a hefty 38 innate bleed buildup make it one of the stronger very-early bleed daggers before Arcane-scaling options open up.

builds.name: Heavy-infusion bleed poke
builds.why: Its Strength lean rewards a Heavy infusion for a str-focused bleed build without needing Arcane investment.
